message:
fix(convoy): respect non-slingable blockers in wave computation (fix-merge of #2207) (#2228)

Fix-merge of #2207 (3 approvals). Resolves conflicts with main's prior #2141 fix. Tasks gated by open non-slingable nodes (decisions, epics) are returned as GatedTask. Also: patrol --root-only removal, UTF-8 title truncation, merge-blocks edge support. Co-authored-by: l0g1x <krgebis@gmail.com>
